## INTERNSHIP COMPLETION CERTIFICATE

To,

Head of Department L. D. College of Engineering, Gujarat Technological University, Ahmedabad, Gujarat

## TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN

This is to certify that Lalji Sankhat , a student of L.D. College of Engineering , Ahmedabad is currently  interning  in  the  field  of  AI/ML  at  Webelight  Solutions  from  1st January, 2026 to 15th April, 2026 (24 weeks), under the guidance of Manav Shah .

During his internship , he is gaining experience with various industry processes. He demonstrates diligence ,  a strong  work  ethic ,  and  an  eagerness  to  learn.  He  is  effectively contributing to  his assigned  tasks ,  showcasing  attention  to  detail,  and  demonstrating skill development in his work.

We appreciate his efforts and look forward to his continued contributions during the remaining duration of his internship .

We wish him every success in his learning journey and career .

For Webelight Solutions,
